productDisplayName: Nike Men's Backboard White Black Shoe
description: Get ready to move in style with these Backboard shoes from nike. The sleek design of these shoes makes it possible to pair it with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic uppers for protection and durability Perforations that act as design features and allow for greater breathability on the toebox Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort Appliqued logo on the sides Brand name appliqued on the tongue and printed behind the collar Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Full-length EVA midsole for cushioning Outsole Outsole with pivot points and circular grooves for greater grip and easy 180 degree movement shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
